blockingIssues.description: PublicLayout user-nav links point to non-existent /users/* routes instead of actual app routes (/login, /register, /admin/account), causing broken navigation.
Article detail page increments hits but keeps rendering stale pre-increment view count, causing displayed views to diverge from DB state.
Search results page hard-codes limit=10 when fetching pages, overriding site_max_search and breaking contract-aligned pagination behavior.
Admin glossary edit page uses permissive parseInt-based ID handling, allowing malformed IDs like 1abc instead of strict invalid-ID redirect behavior.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented canonical current client auth/account route paths to avoid /users/* link mismatches.
Documented Hono nested category route pattern `/:uri{.+}` for multi-segment slugs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit manual-verification checklist item to click every newly added navigation/action link and verify destination routes exist and render expected pages.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: public-layout-homepage introduced /users/* links that were not present in router definitions and were not caught during manual checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify tests-first guidance and require accurate handoff reporting when deviations occur (set followedProcedure=false with rationale when implementation/debugging must precede tests).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: category-browse-pages and glossary-public-and-admin reviews both identified tests-first/procedure-reporting mismatch patterns.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether react-hook-form+zod and shadcn are strict requirements for all forms/pages or preferred defaults with explicit exceptions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: search-functionality used plain controlled form handling while current guidance can be interpreted as universally mandatory.

rejectedObservations.observation: fullstack-worker UI tests-first observation from glossary-public-and-admin
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate (covered by systemic tests-first/procedure-reporting guidance recommendation)

rejectedObservations.observation: strict numeric route-param validation convention gap
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous as a global convention; issue is captured directly as a feature-specific blocking defect

rejectedObservations.observation: zod request-validation reminder for search POST route
rejectedObservations.reason: already encompassed by broader AGENTS/skill clarification recommendation on validation/framework expectations
